scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key facts: integrate(), wait(), all_active(), AppStatusRelation fields, juju.cli() fallback. Adds useful detail about error detection and endpoint syntax.
scores.hallucination_notes: The detailed show-unit JSON structure (relation-info, application-data keys) is presented with high confidence but may not exactly match actual Juju output format. Also juju.wait(jubilant.all_active) without lambda is presented as valid but gold standard shows lambda form. Minor risk of hallucinated JSON structure details.
